EntityType.description: Represents the type of an entity in the semantic layer

oneOf.description: Primary entity representing the main subject of a view
Foreign entity representing a reference to an entity defined in another view

description: Represents an entity in the semantic layer

description.description: Human-readable description of what this entity represents

key.description: The dimension(s) that should be used as the key for the entity Can be a single key or multiple keys for composite primary keys

keys.description: Multiple keys for composite primary keys

name.description: Unique identifier for the entity within the view

title: Entity
